items.name: Level 0 · Surface
items.note: Full static web range — forms, fetch, dialog, tabs, storage, a11y. Zero dependencies.

items.name: Level 1 · Assembly
items.note: Partials, build script, generated site-meta.json — first step beyond hand-written pages.

items.name: Level 2 · Edge
items.note: Serverless Python echo API — static pages calling /api/level-2/echo on Vercel.

items.name: Level 3 · Memory
items.note: Guestbook with Supabase persistence (live) or localStorage demo mode.

items.name: Level 4 · Product
items.note: Product portal — links to full apps on their own subdomain (DOPE Prompt Book).
